requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence — UAE.S / GSO Alignment for Household Refrigerators

summary.en: MoIAT provides UAE and GSO standards-related services under its conformity framework, and UAE market entry for regulated appliances commonly relies on UAE.S / GSO-referenced technical controls. In practical audits, exporters should provide EMC evidence by model against IEC 61000 emission and immunity clauses where MoIAT product scope, utility contract, or buyer specification makes it applicable, and map each report to the UAE/Saudi Gulf context before shipment.
summary.zh: MoIAT在其合格评定框架下提供UAE和GSO相关标准服务，阿联酋对受管家电的市场准入通常采用UAE.S / GSO对齐的技术控制。实际核验中，若MoIAT产品范围、公共事业合同或买方规格适用EMC要求，出口商应按型号提供IEC 61000发射与抗扰度条款证据，并在出货前完成与阿联酋地区情境的映射。
summary.zht: MoIAT在其合格評定框架下提供UAE和GSO相關標準服務，阿聯酋對受管家電的市場准入通常採用UAE.S / GSO對齊的技術控制。實際核驗中，若MoIAT產品範圍、公共事業合同或買方規格適用EMC要求，出口商應按型號提供IEC 61000發射與抗擾度條款證據，並在出貨前完成與阿聯酋地區情境的映射。

standards_or_laws: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology conformity services for products under regulated scope
UAE.S and GSO technical standard-adoption framework for standards-based evidence
IEC 61000-6-1, IEC 61000-6-2, IEC 61000-6-3, IEC 61000-6-4 (environmental EMI/EMS family)
DEWA or other emirate electricity-owner requirements where equipment is part of connected installations

summary.en: Chinese refrigerators in scope for UAE export are typically documented under CCC pathways and the China domestic EMC baseline, including GB 4343.1 and relevant GB/T follow-up limits by product family. Chinese reports are useful engineering inputs but are not treated as automatic UAE.S / GSO evidence because conformity route, report format, and importer-facing wording differ.
summary.zh: 出口中属于相关路径的中国冰箱通常基于CCC体系和中国国内EMC基线进行申报，包括GB 4343.1及对应GB/T产品族条款。中国报告可作为工程输入，但由于合格路径、报告格式和面向进口商的表述差异，不视为自动满足UAE.S / GSO的证据。
summary.zht: 出口中國屬於相關路徑的冰箱通常基於CCC體系和中國國內EMC基線進行申報，包括GB 4343.1及對應GB/T產品族條款。中國報告可作為工程輸入，但由於合格路徑、報告格式和面向進口商的表述差異，不視為自動滿足UAE.S / GSO的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus (mandatory under CCC context)
GB/T 4343.2 — Electromagnetic immunity family standard used for relevant appliance categories
CCC — China Compulsory Certification for applicable product classes

gap.en: The gap is not simply emissions test execution; it is scope and acceptance alignment. Chinese emissions reports may use domestic configurations and test set-ups that do not map exactly to UAE.S/GSO interpretation requested by MoIAT, importers, project owners, or utilities. Re-test, re-mapping, or a formal test report addendum is usually required before claiming UAE-ready status.
gap.zh: 差距不只是是否执行EMC测试，而是范围与接收方式的对齐。中国EMC报告可能采用的产品配置和测试布置不一定与MoIAT、进口商、项目业主或公用事业在UAE.S/GSO解读下完全对应。通常需要复测、映射补充或报告补充说明后才可主张可进入阿联酋市场。
gap.zht: 差距不只是否執行EMC測試，而是範圍與接收方式的對齊。中國EMC報告可能採用的產品配置和測試布置不一定與MoIAT、進口商、項目業主或公用事業在UAE.S/GSO解讀下完全對應。通常需要複測、映射補充或報告補充說明後才可主張可進入阿聯酋市場。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC evidence is mandatory where MoIAT scope, importer contract, project specification, or utility review requires EMC compliance for the model
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where the refrigerator model is within CCC and GB EMC catalogue scope; report quality and scope are validated by CNCA-designated auditors in China

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For UAE refrigerator export, Chinese GB/GBCS EMC documentation is useful only as a base. Exporters should verify whether MoIAT, the intended importer, and utility or project documents explicitly require IEC 61000 evidence mapped to UAE.S/GSO language before launch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对阿联酋出口而言，中国GB/CCC EMC文件仅是基础性参考。出口商应核实MoIAT、目标进口商及公用事业/项目文件是否明确要求按UAE.S/GSO用语映射到IEC 61000证据后方可正式放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對阿聯酋出口而言，中國GB/CCC EMC文件僅是基礎性參考。出口商應核實MoIAT、目標進口商及公用事業／項目文件是否明確要求按UAE.S/GSO用語映射到IEC 61000證據後方可正式放行。
